measurement_policy.reward_policy: Rewards are paid only for improving the predefined technical_task_router.benchmark_score/v2 composite benchmark. Model diversity, cheap-model use, and sparse-cell coverage affect rewards only through the frozen component formulas and benchmark scenarios.
measurement_policy.dataset_hash_semantics: dataset_version must be the canonical sha256:<64 lowercase hex> hash of the ordered v2 benchmark row artifact after canonical JSON serialization.

success_under_budget.row_formula: 1 when selected models are allowed, completed_successfully is true, and actual_cost_usd <= max_cost_usd; otherwise 0

candidate_pool_robustness.formula: mean(success_under_budget(row) for rows where scenario is 'challenger_present', 'dominant_model_removed', or 'low_budget')

scenario_taxonomy.production_pool: Current production candidate pool and normal budget.
scenario_taxonomy.challenger_present: Production pool plus at least one declared challenger or materially cheaper model family, such as qwen, that may not dominate the initial corpus.
scenario_taxonomy.dominant_model_removed: Current dominant production model family removed from the relevant role pool to test fallback quality.
scenario_taxonomy.low_budget: Budget tightened enough that cost-effective alternatives can beat expensive defaults when quality is comparable.
scenario_taxonomy.sparse_cell: Task type, domain, complexity, or model-family cell with limited historical support.
